🔗 Connect Amazon Ads in 4 Steps
1️⃣
Create App
Go to advertising.amazon.com → Tools → API Access → Create Application
2️⃣
Get Credentials
Copy Client ID, Client Secret, and complete OAuth to get Refresh Token
3️⃣
Find Profile ID
Call GET /v2/profiles to find your brand's Profile ID
4️⃣
Add to config.env
AMAZON_CLIENT_ID, AMAZON_CLIENT_SECRET, AMAZON_REFRESH_TOKEN, AMAZON_PROFILE_ID
